tier2_labels.1: sorghum panicle with no ergot, no honeydew, completely clean healthy panicle
tier2_labels.2: sorghum panicle with slight ergot infection, few small honeydew droplets on 1-10% of spikelets
tier2_labels.3: sorghum panicle with moderate ergot infection, honeydew droplets on 11-25% of spikelets
tier2_labels.4: sorghum panicle with heavy ergot infection, extensive honeydew on 26-50% of spikelets, visible mold
tier2_labels.5: sorghum panicle with severe ergot infection, entire panicle covered in honeydew, over 50% affected, sclerotia forming

tier2_labels.1: healthy sorghum leaf with no anthracnose lesions
tier2_labels.2: sorghum leaf with few small anthracnose lesions, 1-10% leaf area affected
tier2_labels.3: sorghum leaf with moderate anthracnose, lesions on 11-25% of leaf area
tier2_labels.4: sorghum leaf with severe anthracnose, 26-50% leaf area covered in lesions
tier2_labels.5: sorghum leaf heavily damaged by anthracnose, over 50% leaf area with coalescing lesions

tier2_labels.1: sorghum field plot with no visible panicles or all panicles still in boot stage, no flowering
tier2_labels.2: sorghum field plot with less than 25 percent of plants showing panicles with extruded yellow anthers, most plants not yet flowering
tier2_labels.3: sorghum field plot with approximately 50 percent of plants showing yellow anthers on panicles, half of the plot is flowering
tier2_labels.4: sorghum field plot with more than 75 percent of plants flowering, most panicles have visible anthers, some starting to dry
tier2_labels.5: sorghum field plot fully past flowering, all panicles done with anthesis, grain filling has begun, no fresh anthers visible

tier2_labels.1: very loose open sorghum panicle with widely spaced branches
tier2_labels.2: loose sorghum panicle with visible gaps between branches
tier2_labels.3: medium compact sorghum panicle with moderate branch density
tier2_labels.4: compact sorghum panicle with tightly packed branches
tier2_labels.5: very compact dense sorghum panicle, cylindrical shape, no gaps

tier2_labels.1: sorghum panicle with very poor seed set, less than 20% of florets filled, mostly empty glumes
tier2_labels.2: sorghum panicle with poor seed set, 20-40% of florets filled
tier2_labels.3: sorghum panicle with moderate seed set, 40-60% of florets filled
tier2_labels.4: sorghum panicle with good seed set, 60-80% of florets filled
tier2_labels.5: sorghum panicle with excellent seed set, over 80% of florets filled, plump grains throughout
